command: uv run python scripts/train_if7_hebbian_model.py --corpus-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d5_balanced/corpus.jsonl --split train --validation-split validation --node-count 2048 --max-active-nodes 48 --max-train-rows 26000 --max-validation-rows 804 --max-train-patterns 2000000 --max-validation-patterns 100000 --text-window-bytes 256 --text-window-stride-bytes 64 --epochs 1 --batch-size 512 --learning-rate 0.01 --recall-at-k 32 --device rocm --output results/IF7h_hebbian_trained_model_d5_2m_windows.json --experiment-id IF7h_hebbian_trained_model_d5_2m_windows --seed 123

cue_only.description: Trained linear multilabel predictor from cue nodes only.

cue_plus_hebbian.description: Trained linear multilabel predictor from cue nodes plus Hebbian completion scores.

notes: Trained IF7 supervised multilabel model on real corpus rows. Compares a cue-only trained model against a cue-plus-Hebbian-conditioned trained model.
